issues.description: Effect structure is fundamentally wrong. The card has a single [On Play] trigger with two sequential actions (optional flip, then mandatory add to Life), not two separate triggers.

FlipLife is incorrect. The effect should allow choosing 1 card from top OR bottom of Life cards to add to hand, then add up to 1 card from hand to top of Life cards. This requires DrawCard (with Life as source) and AttachDon (or similar) in sequence.
Spurious second trigger with PlaySelf action. This trigger and action do not correspond to any text in the card effect.
